name: rifah-platform
description: Rifah Multi-Tenant Booking Platform - Root Package

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install && cd ../tenant && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:docker" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:tenant" "npm run dev:public"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:docker" "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:tenant"
scripts.start:client: cd client && npm run build && npm start
scripts.start:admin: cd admin && npm run build && npm start
scripts.start:tenant: cd tenant && npm run build && npm start
